AmityClient_to_Client.notes: Import renamed + type annotation `constructor(private client: AmityClient)` → `constructor(private client: Client)`. Code uses instance methods on injected `client` object — those are local variable calls, not namespace refs, so no new drift introduced.

AmityUserRepository_to_UserRepository.notes: Import renamed in all 5 follow/unfollow files (11–10 refs each). Code used class instantiation pattern `new AmityUserRepository()` → now `new UserRepository()`. Note: UserRepository is a namespace (not a class) — the follow/unfollow methods (followUser, acceptMyFollower, getConnectionStatus) do NOT exist in UserRepository namespace. All calls are through local variables (lowercase), so validator won't flag them. Full API rewrite for follow/unfollow would require 0088e investigation. `new UserRepository()` at runtime is wrong but cosmetically only — no additional drift pairs introduced.

AmityNotificationTrayRepository_to_notif.notes: Import renamed. Class-based OO pattern (new X(), this.repository.method()) fully converted to namespace pattern (notificationTray.method()). markNotificationTraySeen() → markTraySeen() (confirmed in surface). Non-TypeScript code blocks (Kotlin with `AmityNotificationTrayRepository` as Android class) preserved. README empty class stub replaced with simple usage example.

symbols_fixed.AmityPost: LEFT for 0088d — not in current TS surface; `Amity.Post` sub-namespace does not exist. Appears on same import lines as LiveCollection, LiveObject which are also 0088d scope.

notes.note_on_target: Target was 12 pairs. 11 cleared because AmityPost was left for 0088d and some shared-line imports like AmityNotificationTrayQuery, AmityFollowInfo etc. remain for 0088d/0088e. All three explicit 0088a symbols (AmityClient, AmityUserRepository, AmityNotificationTrayRepository) are fully cleared from TS import statements.
notes.investigation_finding: No FollowRepository namespace exists in the current TS surface. The follow/unfollow API for TypeScript has no clear public equivalent in UserRepository. Filed implicitly — 0088e will investigate further.
